General.Name: Ozaurum Resources Ltd
General.Description: OzAurum Resources Limited, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the exploration and development of gold properties in Australia and Brazil. It also explores for lithium, niobium, and rare earth elements deposits. OzAurum Resources Limited was incorporated in 2020 and is based in West Kalgoorlie, Australia.
General.Address: 15 Williams Street, West Kalgoorlie, WA, Australia, 6430

1.Name: Mr. Stephen John Hewitt-Dutton B.Bus., C.A., SA Fin
